channel.title: Frontion Geopolitical Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Agrees to Halt Attacks on Israel, Lebanon Says
item.description: Lebanon announces Hezbollah has accepted a US-backed reciprocal ceasefire with Israel. Israeli PM Netanyahu warns strikes on Beirut will continue if Hezbollah violates the agreement.

item.title: 🇫🇷 France Seizes Russian-Linked Oil Tanker in Atlantic with UK Support
item.description: French Navy boarded a sanctioned Russian oil tanker with British helicopter assistance, Macron announced. The operation marks continued enforcement of sanctions on Russian energy exports.

item.title: 🇭🇺 Hungarian PM Threatens to Oust President in Constitutional Clash
item.description: Hungary opposition leader Péter Magyar demands President Tamás Sulyok step aside, setting up a constitutional confrontation after months of political tension following the Orbán era.

item.title: 🇩🇰 Denmark Forms Centre-Left Coalition Amid Greenland Tensions with US
item.description: Mette Frederiksen secures third consecutive term as prime minister with a centre-left coalition, facing ongoing diplomatic crisis with the United States over Greenland.

item.title: 🇻🇪 Venezuelan Ruling Party Unity Fractures as Delcy Rodríguez Shifts Policy
item.description: Chavismo coalition shows cracks as Delcy Rodríguez moves away from Chávez-era policies amid Venezuela complex political and economic crisis.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Eyes Limited US Deal to Relieve Economic Strain and Buy Time
item.description: Iran is considering a limited diplomatic agreement with the United States to ease economic pressure and extend its strategic position.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Says Contradictory US Positions Delaying Diplomacy
item.description: Iran accuses the US of sending conflicting signals while Israeli strikes on Lebanon undermine diplomatic progress.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Attacks Russian Energy Sites: What Has Been Hit
item.description: Ukrainian strikes on Russian oil infrastructure continue as part of a sustained campaign targeting Moscow energy export capacity.

item.title: 🇦🇲 Russia Ups Pressure on Armenia Ahead of Sunday Election
item.description: Moscow intensifies pressure on Armenia before elections that could shift the country toward closer Western alignment.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea Export Growth Hits Four-Decade High on Record Chip Sales
item.description: South Korean exports surge to their strongest level in 40 years, driven by unprecedented semiconductor demand from the AI boom.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran May Block Hormuz Strait, Stops Message Exchanges with US
item.description: Tehran threatens to close the strategic Strait of Hormuz and halts diplomatic communications with Washington.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump Says Iran Really Wants to Make a Deal with US
item.description: President Trump signals Iran is interested in reaching an agreement, as diplomatic tensions persist.

item.title: 🛢️ US Crude Exports Hit Record High as Iran War Tightens Global Oil Supply
item.description: American oil exports reached unprecedented levels in May as the Iran conflict squeezed global energy markets.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelenskiy Aide Says Peace Deal by Winter Is Realistic
item.description: A senior Ukrainian official believes a peace settlement with Russia could be achieved before winter.

item.title: 🇫🇷 France Navy Boarded Russia-Linked Oil Tanker, Macron Says
item.description: French forces intercepted a tanker connected to Russian sanctions evasion operations.

item.title: 💥 Two Explosions Hit Cargo Vessel in Gulf off Iraq
item.description: Two explosions struck a commercial ship in the Gulf near Iraqi waters, officials reported.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Explosions Rock Kyiv Amid Intelligence Warnings of Russian Mass Attack
item.description: Explosions reported in the Ukrainian capital as intelligence services warned of a large-scale Russian assault.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Aiming to Advance Ukraine Membership Slightly Faster Than Planned
item.description: European Union officials work to accelerate Ukraine integration process amid ongoing war.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Drafts Comprehensive Sanctions List Targeting US Allies in 63 Tech Sectors
item.description: Beijing prepares broad countermeasures against Washington and partner nations across critical technology industries.

item.title: 🛢️ Guyana Emerges as Oil Winner Amid Iran War
item.description: South American nation benefits from elevated oil prices and supply disruptions in the Middle East.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China SAIC Plans First EU Car Plant in Spanish Galicia
item.description: Major Chinese automaker moves to establish manufacturing presence in Europe amid tariff pressures.

item.title: 🇸🇳 Senegal Ousted Prime Minister Says Party Will Not Participate in New Government
item.description: Former Senegalese prime minister announces party boycott of new administration following political crisis.

item.title: ⚔️ Iranian-Backed Militant We Are War, US Court Hears
item.description: Alleged Iran-backed militant proclaimed ongoing war during US court proceedings.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Navy Munitions Innovation Hubs Face Challenges
item.description: US Navy efforts to modernize weapons production encounter obstacles amid rising demand.
